privileged_info_summary: The curate_document_topics task operates within a Nuxeo Platform environment with two target documents: 'Project-Specifications' (initially tagged with subject 'art') and 'Gallery-Brochure' (initially untagged). The task requires correcting subject classifications: removing 'art' from Project-Specifications and adding 'sciences' instead, while adding 'art' to Gallery-Brochure. Both documents are located in the '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects' workspace. All data is synthetically generated by the task setup script; the verifier validates subject metadata changes via Nuxeo REST API queries.
